title: Audit console.log/error statements for sensitive data exposure
summary: Codebase has 123+ instances of console.log/error. Need audit to ensure no sensitive data (tokens, keys, user data) is being logged.
acceptance: Audit all console statements for sensitive data
Replace problematic logging with structured sanitized logs
Add linting rule to prevent future sensitive data logging
Document safe logging patterns in CONTRIBUTING.md
notes: Already using structured logging in many places. Need to extend pattern uniformly.
